metadata.description: Miguel's portable Agent Skills for Claude Code, Codex, and pi.

plugins.name: hands-free
plugins.description: Route AI coding-assistant questions and approvals to a phone call through Vapi. Works with Claude Code, Codex, and pi.

plugins.name: parable
plugins.description: Multi-model coding orchestration: plan, route to the cheapest capable executor model, verify with code, review with fresh eyes.

plugins.name: cascade
plugins.description: Cascading development loops — plan, advance, or take over a chain of bounded, evidence-gated development loops.

plugins.name: recall
plugins.description: Indexed search over Claude Code + Codex session history — find, continue, repeat, or skill-ify prior work

plugins.name: recap
plugins.description: Evidence-backed end-to-end comprehension of one exact coding-agent session.

plugins.name: tether
plugins.description: Keep Slack threads attached to their Codex, Claude Code, Zellij, Hermes, or headless agents without exposing Slack credentials.

plugins.name: desloppify
plugins.description: Portable evidence-backed codebase cleanup with Peter O'Malley's official Desloppify engine.

plugins.name: autoqa
plugins.description: Self-QA a repo's running app end-to-end — discover run/auth/features, build a feature×modality test matrix, execute it live, and produce a witnessed pass/fail report.
